prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年上海市综合类最低录取位次分别为约11614→12224→11739→13763→13615名，整体呈波动后移趋势。2021–2023年基本稳定在1.16万–1.22万之间，2024年骤降至13763名（后移约2000名），2025年略回升至13615名。近两年位次中枢明显后移约2000名，2025年基准约13615名；该校在上海市综合类招生计划2021–2025年均为4人，2026年大幅扩增至14人，增幅达250%。扩招幅度极大，按供需弹性模型测算，供给大幅增加将显著推高最低录取位次（竞争加剧），基准位次从13615名大幅后移至约34038名。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 西北大学为211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名2021年第64→2022年第67→2023年第65→2024年第67→2025年第70→2026年第70名，近年稳定在70名左右，属中上游211层次；2026年高考周期声誉评价为偏负面，主要涉及文学院副教授贾浅浅被举报论文抄袭事件，学校已成立工作专班调查。抖音综合热度排名第81位（评价为一般），短视频曝光量处于中低水平，未出现明显报考关注升温信号。历史投档异常记录中未见西北大学相关断档信号；第五轮学科评估中，地质学获评A、考古学获评A、软件工程获评A-，共3个A类学科。考古学为该校传统王牌专业，与上海招生专业中的考古学直接对应；软件工程A-与新增人工智能、通信工程等实验班有学科关联。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 2026年招生计划新增人工智能（钱学森班）、通信工程（灵犀新一代通信技术实验班）、应用物理学（智能光电创新实验班）等热门工科实验班，计算机/人工智能类、电子信息/通信类专业社会热度为高热推荐，有望吸引更多高分考生报考。本省2026年普通高考考生总数约66700人（较2025年综合类49276人增加约35.4%），考生规模大幅增长将加剧整体竞争；省控线（本科批）近年稳定在400–405分，无明显波动；西北大学位于陕西省西安市，属西部高校，在上海为非本省招生。该校在上海市招生占比极小（2021–2025年计划仅4人），2026年扩至14人后仍属小规模招生。上海考生对西部高校的地域偏好一般，无明显地域加成或减分效应。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次后移趋势、2026年招生计划大幅扩增250%、本省考生总数显著增加约35%、新增热门工科实验班吸引高分考生、以及声誉偏负面等因素，在，考虑考生规模激增和热门专业吸引力做小幅上调，同时考虑声誉偏负面做小幅下调，最终预测2026年最低录取位次约34438名，区间33938–34938名。最关键影响因素为：①招生计划从4人扩至14人（供给大幅增加推高位次）；②本省考生总数从4.9万增至6.7万（竞争加剧）；③新增人工智能等热门专业实验班（吸引高分考生报考）。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:
一档（最难进）
- 人工智能（钱学森班）
- 通信工程（灵犀新一代通信技术实验班）
- 应用物理学（智能光电创新实验班）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:
二档（中等）
- 金融学（开源证券智能金融实验班）
- 工商管理类（含工商管理、会计学专业）
- 汉语言文学（人工智能与创意写作实验班）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:
三档（相对好进）
- 外国语言文学类（含英语、日语、俄语专业）
- 考古学。
major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 2026年西北大学在上海大幅扩招，预测位次区间33938–34938名，较往年显著后移。位次在此区间内的考生可以二档专业为主力填报、一档专业冲刺、三档专业保底。位次明显优于区间下限（<33938名）可重点冲刺一档的人工智能、通信工程等热门实验班；位次接近区间上限（约34938名）建议优先考虑三档的外国语言文学类和考古学以确保录取。考古学为该校A级王牌学科，虽列三档但学科实力突出，对考古方向有兴趣的考生可重点关注。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum admission rankings for Shanghai comprehensive category were approximately 11614 → 12224 → 11739 → 13763 → 13615, showing a fluctuating and backward trend. From 2021 to 2023, it was basically stable between 11,600 and 12,200. In 2024, it sharply dropped to 13,763 (backward by about 2,000 places), and in 2025, it slightly recovered to 13,615. In the past two years, the median ranking has significantly shifted backward by about 2,000 places, with the 2025 baseline at about 13,615. The university's enrollment plan in Shanghai for comprehensive category was 4 students from 2021 to 2025, and in 2026, it will greatly expand to 14 students, an increase of 250%. The expansion is extremely large. According to the supply-demand elasticity model, a substantial increase in supply will significantly push up the minimum admission ranking (intensified competition), shifting the baseline ranking from 13,615 to about 34,038.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Northwest University is a 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university. In the Soft Science China University Rankings, it ranked 64th in 2021 → 67th in 2022 → 65th in 2023 → 67th in 2024 → 70th in 2025 → 70th in 2026, stable around 70th in recent years, belonging to the upper-middle tier of 211 universities. The reputation evaluation for the 2026 college entrance examination cycle is slightly negative, mainly involving the incident where Associate Professor Jia Qianqian from the School of Literature was reported for plagiarism in her papers, and the university has set up a special task force to investigate. The comprehensive popularity ranking on Douyin is 81st (evaluation: average), with short video exposure at a medium-low level, showing no obvious signs of increased application attention. No historical admission anomalies related to Northwest University have been found. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Geology received an A, Archaeology received an A, and Software Engineering received an A-, totaling three A-level disciplines. Archaeology is the university's traditional flagship major, directly corresponding to the Archaeology major in Shanghai's enrollment. Software Engineering A- is related to the newly added experimental classes such as Artificial Intelligence and Communication Engineering.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The 2026 enrollment plan adds popular engineering experimental classes such as Artificial Intelligence (Qian Xuesen Class), Communication Engineering (Lingxi New Generation Communication Technology Experimental Class), and Applied Physics (Intelligent Optoelectronic Innovation Experimental Class). The social popularity of Computer/Artificial Intelligence and Electronic Information/Communication majors is highly recommended, which is expected to attract more high-scoring candidates. The total number of ordinary college entrance examination candidates in this province in 2026 is about 66,700 (an increase of about 35.4% compared to 49,276 comprehensive category candidates in 2025), and the significant increase in candidate scale will intensify overall competition. The provincial control line (undergraduate batch) has been stable at 400–405 points in recent years, with no significant fluctuations. Northwest University is located in Xi'an, Shaanxi Province, a western university, and is a non-provincial enrollment in Shanghai. The university's enrollment proportion in Shanghai is very small (only 4 students planned from 2021 to 2025), and after expanding to 14 students in 2026, it is still a small-scale enrollment. Shanghai candidates generally have average regional preference for western universities, with no obvious regional bonus or penalty effect.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the historical trend of backward rankings, the 250% expansion of the 2026 enrollment plan, the significant increase of about 35% in the total number of candidates in this province, the addition of popular engineering experimental classes attracting high-scoring candidates, and the slightly negative reputation, after making a small upward adjustment considering the surge in candidate numbers and the attractiveness of popular majors, and a small downward adjustment considering the slightly negative reputation, the final predicted minimum admission ranking for 2026 is about 34,438, with a range of 33,938–34,938. The most critical influencing factors are: ① The enrollment plan expanded from 4 to 14 students (significant increase in supply pushing up the ranking); ② The total number of candidates in this province increased from 49,000 to 67,000 (intensified competition); ③ The addition of popular majors such as Artificial Intelligence experimental classes (attracting high-scoring candidates).

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Difficult)
- Artificial Intelligence (Qian Xuesen Class)
- Communication Engineering (Lingxi New Generation Communication Technology Experimental Class)
- Applied Physics (Intelligent Optoelectronic Innovation Experimental Class).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Medium)
- Finance (Kaiyuan Securities Intelligent Finance Experimental Class)
- Business Administration (including Business Administration, Accounting majors)
- Chinese Language and Literature (Artificial Intelligence and Creative Writing Experimental Class).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy)
- Foreign Languages and Literature (including English, Japanese, Russian majors)
- Archaeology.
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: In 2026, Northwest University will significantly expand enrollment in Shanghai, with a predicted ranking range of 33,938–34,938, significantly backward compared to previous years. Candidates within this ranking range can mainly apply for Tier 2 majors, aim for Tier 1 majors, and use Tier 3 majors as safety options. Candidates with rankings significantly better than the lower limit of the range (<33,938) can focus on aiming for Tier 1 popular experimental classes such as Artificial Intelligence and Communication Engineering; candidates with rankings close to the upper limit of the range (about 34,938) are advised to prioritize Tier 3 majors such as Foreign Languages and Literature and Archaeology to ensure admission. Archaeology is the university's A-level flagship discipline. Although listed in Tier 3, its disciplinary strength is outstanding. Candidates interested in archaeology can pay special attention to it.
